summary: Implemented ADR 0207 on the live-apply workstream, then reverified and merged it on the 0.177.39 mainline release tree by translating Hetzner DNS payloads into canonical facts, hardening worker-safe and login-shell validation portability, pruning stale immutable worker files, and proving the provider boundary through local, authoritative build-server, recut-tree fallback, worker-local, and live DNS paths.

verification.observed: uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py tests/test_validate_alert_rules.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_post_merge_gate.py tests/test_provider_boundary_catalog.py tests/test_hetzner_dns_record_role.py tests/test_hetzner_dns_records_role.py tests/test_plane_client.py tests/test_remote_exec.py tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_closure_loop_windmill.py tests/test_config_merge_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_correction_loops.py tests/test_incident_triage.py tests/test_live_apply_receipts.py tests/unit/test_closure_loop.py -q passed with 117 passed in 23.73s on the merged 0.177.39 tree.

./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-vars role-argument-specs json alert-rules data-models generated-docs generated-portals agent-standards returned 0 on the merged 0.177.39 release tree after the canonical truth, platform manifest, ADR index, and generated diagrams were refreshed.

verification.check: Remote validation manifest across build-server and recut fallback paths
verification.observed: make remote-validate first returned 0 as the authoritative build-server validation manifest on the merged 0.177.38 tree after one transient 'fatal: unable to read 240836fb6798e9beddff83d0e72239864622042d' line. After the 0.177.39 recut, the same target hit build-server rsync 'failed to set times' errors under build/docs-portal/*, fell back locally via scripts/remote_exec.sh, and still returned 0 after the full manifest because the login-shell fallback now preserves a Python 3.10+ interpreter for scripts/validate_repo.sh.

verification.check: Worker-safe repository validation and provider-boundary fallback
verification.observed: python3 /srv/proxmox_florin_server/config/windmill/scripts/post-merge-gate.py --repo-path /srv/proxmox_florin_server returned status ok on docker-runtime-lv3 after ./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-vars role-argument-specs json alert-rules generated-docs generated-portals returned 0 and uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/provider_boundary_catalog.py --validate returned 0. The captured primary gate output still records the separate registry runner image failure on docker-runtime-lv3, so the worker-safe fallback remains the live proof while build-server remote validation stays the authoritative full-manifest path.

verification.check: Windmill worker mirror replay from the integration worktree
verification.observed: ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ANSIBLE_REMOTE_TEMP=/tmp ./scripts/run_with_namespace.sh uvx --from pyyaml python ./scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py run --inventory ./inventory/hosts.yml --playbook ./playbooks/windmill.yml --env production -- --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump -e windmill_worker_checkout_repo_root_local_dir=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0207-main-recut --limit docker-runtime-lv3 finished docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=220 changed=39 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=32.

The worktree-pinned worker replay removed stale immutable files from /srv/proxmox_florin_server and the obsolete docs/workstreams/ws-0204-live-apply.md plus docs/workstreams/ws-0209-live-apply.md entries were no longer present on docker-runtime-lv3 afterwards.

The catalog-backed playbooks/provision-subdomain.yml flow was run through scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py for ops.lv3.org; the live Hetzner DNS role translated the raw zone and record payloads into canonical facts, selected one canonical managed match, skipped both create and update, and finished ok=19 changed=0 skipped=2 failed=0.

notes: The integrated main release now consumes this verified live-apply receipt while recording repo version 0.177.39 and platform version 0.130.38.

During the mainline re-verification, the worker replay had to pin windmill_worker_checkout_repo_root_local_dir to the active worktree because the default controller path otherwise mirrored the shared top-level checkout instead of the branch under test.

The authoritative merged-tree build-server validation pass printed one transient remote git object lookup failure before continuing, but make remote-validate still exited 0 after the full manifest sweep so it was treated as non-blocking remote workspace ancestry noise rather than a release failure.

When the final 0.177.39 recut reran make remote-validate, rsync could not set mtimes under build/docs-portal/* on the build-server workspace, so scripts/remote_exec.sh fell back locally; the hardened login-shell fallback still completed the full validation manifest and exited 0.

An earlier database.lv3.org reconcile reached the canonical translation and match-selection steps but exposed that the record was absent in the live Hetzner zone, so the idempotent evidence path was re-run against the already-governed ops.lv3.org hostname instead of mixing ADR 0207 proof with a separate DNS create-policy question.
